examples: The major factors of the soil developed from arenite were soil-layer depth, non-capillary porosity and humus depth.
Arenite dolomite, oolitic dolomite, silty dolomite, silty-fine dolomite, oolitic limestone and arenite are of reservoir signification.
Analysis results of a number of testing data indicated that: sandstone reservoir of Fu-Yang oil-bearing layer has lower composition maturity, mainly are feldspathic arenite and lithic arkose.
